Global luxury retail brand selling high end books to corporates for gifting purposes.  Commission up to 45%.
Short summary


ROADS is a global lifestyle brand based in Dublin, Ireland.  This opportunity relates to its book division, ROADS Publishing. 

ROADS Publishing is a high-end publisher of illustrated books specialising in art, design, culture and fashion, together with designer classics, travel guides and luxury special editions.

ROADS Publishing's products are sold on every continent in all good book stores as well as in high end department stores, such as Harrods, Sefridges, Corso Como, FortyFiveTen & Neiman Marcus.  Our books are also sold in the most prestigious museums in the world, including the MET in New York and the Tate Modern in London.

Our books range in price from £9 to £1,000 each.

This opportunity is to sell our books to corporate entities for their use as corporate gifts.  For example, to a company that wants to provide unique & special gifts to their clients at a particular event or on a particular occasion. 

More details on our books (along with our current catalogue) can be found on the ROADS Publishing section of our website: http://www.roads.co/books/

	
USP: 

ROADS includes a publishing house, a fragrance division and a film production company.  

ROADS Publishing is unique in modern publishing: it combines elegance and escapism with a truly forward-thinking world view and a focus on innovation. Working with the best international artists, curators and designers, ROADS creates books that are collectable and timeless works of art.

By allowing online customers to “preview it” on real people matching their size, skin tone, and hair texture, Reflekt Me bridges the gap between aspirational social content and uninspiring product pages.

We’re looking for experienced sales agents with strong networks in fashion, e-commerce, or SaaS who can close mid-market and enterprise brands or help expand private integrations.

Reflekt Me is a VC-backed, AI-powered SaaS platform that enables e-commerce brands to deliver radically inclusive and personalized shopping experiences. By showcasing REAL PEOPLE of every size, skin tone, and hair texture using every product variation—directly on product landing pages—Reflekt Me turns static pages into dynamic, conversion-driving storefronts.

Our technology ensures that 100% of online shoppers see themselves represented in your clients brand—building trust, boosting engagement, and lifting sales performance.

Total Shopper Inclusion: Customers see themselves in your products, which leads to deeper emotional connection and buying confidence.

Short summary


Employee Confidential is an online and mobile platform that provides employees with an anonymous reporting system for incidents. For example: discrimination, harassment, fraud, theft and workplace safety. 

Campus Confidential provides students, faculty and employees a safe and anonymous reporting system for incidents. For example: hazing, alcohol and drug abuse, harassment, violence, bullying and suicide ideation. 

The EU Whistleblower Directive now mandates that EU companies with 250+ employees (and 50+ employees in 2023) implement an internal whisleblower solution. See attached documents. 

Both platforms have a: 

Reporter Dashboard for employees (or students) to check on case status, correspond anonymously with HR personal at the company and add additional evidence or information. 
An Incident Management solution for companies to investigate and resolve cases.  This includes messaging, tasks, investigation management and analytics. The analytics help track and report on behaviors, organizational influences and environmental factors that drive misconduct.

CLOSERS: 20% for closed new sales and 10% for renewals

 20-30% commission on all closed business. 
15% on annual renewals for the lifetime of the client. (95% clients renew for 6+ years)
10% annual commission on all partner/reseller closed business ($50K -$1M per annum deals). 
10% annual commission on qualified referrals that we close.

Earn $900–$2,000+ Per Order | 30–40% Commissions | Innovative Oral Spray Vitamins | Global Opportunity.
Short summary


Earn $900–$2,000+ per wholesale order selling innovative oral spray supplements with 30–40% commissions and long-term recurring reorders from clinics and pharmacies worldwide.

You’ll introduce Nutrioz’s precision oral spray vitamins to pharmacies, wellness clinics, IV therapy centers, gyms, and health retailers looking for differentiated, high-margin supplement products. The concept is simple and compelling: no swallowing, fast absorption, and clean formulations manufactured in a certified U.S. facility.

A typical first order ranges from $3,000–$5,000, allowing you to earn $900–$2,000+ per deal depending on volume tier. With commissions starting at 30% and scaling to 40%, your earning power increases as your accounts grow.

Because supplements are consumed daily, most clinics reorder monthly or every two months. You earn full commissions on every repeat order for as long as the account remains active, creating meaningful residual income.

You are welcome to operate globally and build your own market. This is a flexible, scalable B2B opportunity in a fast-growing wellness category.

	
USP: 

Nutrioz is pioneering a new category of vitamin delivery through Molecular Spray Technology®. Instead of relying on traditional tablets and capsules, we deliver nutrients via precision oral sprays absorbed directly through the mouth lining.

Each spray is carefully formulated with non-GMO ingredients and manufactured in a certified U.S. cGMP facility. Our products are designed for consistent dosing,

Short summary


WHO WE ARE:

CarHive is a next generation pay per lead platform helping new car dealers throughout the U.S. get better quality, vetted sales leads at scale. Our proprietary technology delivers targeted, ready-to-buy car shoppers with no long-term commitment and no monthly retainer. Dealers don’t have to wade through bad leads anymore…CarHive is here to save them time and help them sell more cars.

WHO YOU ARE:

A polished and enthusiastic sales pro who has mastered the art of the consultative phone sale. You are driven by a top-shelf pay plan and you take pride in nurturing the relationships necessary to build your ‘book of business’. You know activity drives results and you’re not afraid to put in the effort every day. You’re disciplined, organized, and ready to be part of a fun and supportive team.

WHAT YOUR DAY WILL LOOK LIKE:

You will be calling out to US-based new car dealers and walking them through the opportunity to buy a minimum of 100+ leads or more each month. Each day you will call and work through our CRM with no set territories…you choose the markets you want to call. After onboarding, you manage the account and foster the relationship necessary to grow their monthly spend.

20% Recurring Commission! Sell £65/Mo CDM 2015 SaaS to UK Principal Designers | Fast Closures | Exclusive Territory
Short summary


Earn 20% recurring commission selling a £65/month CDM 2015 SaaS platform to UK Principal Designers who legally must manage compliance—fast sales cycles, defined niche, exclusive territory.

You’ll target Principal Designers, CDM Consultants, and Health & Safety leads inside architectural and construction-focused firms across the UK. These professionals are legally responsible for structured CDM documentation, yet many still rely on fragmented manual systems.

Your role is to prospect and book qualified demos. We join the call, run the live walkthrough, and support the close. Prospects can activate a free project immediately, reducing buying resistance.

At £65 average MRR, you earn £13 per month per subscriber, or £156 across the first 12 months. With sales cycles measured in days and no heavy IT integration required, you can build a recurring commission base quickly and predictably.

	
USP: 

Mosaic App Limited is a SaaS company built by CDM professionals who were frustrated with fragmented tools and manual processes. We didn’t build another file-sharing platform—we built a structured CDM framework.

The software replaces spreadsheets, shared folders, and email chains with a purpose-built system designed specifically for CDM 2015 compliance. It allows Principal Designers to demonstrate the compliance work done—not just produce final documents.
